title: Cancellation of Paytm Payments Bank License
description: The RBI officially cancelled the banking licence of Paytm Payments Bank Limited (PPBL) effective from the close of business on April 24, 2026. The central bank outlined multiple statutory violations as the primary reasons for the revocation, noting that the affairs of the bank were conducted in a manner detrimental to the interests of its depositors, with the management's conduct prejudicial to public interest and violating Section 22(3) of the Banking Regulation Act.
